name: @bindtty/example-counter
description: BindTTY counter example with Button and signals.

scripts.build:deps: npm run build --workspace @bindtty/signal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/text && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/vnode && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/jsx-runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/layout && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/renderer-terminal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/terminal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/interaction && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/widgets && npm run build --workspace bindtty
